pages.text: A sun-baked isle of sand over sandstone, cored with smooth sandstone. Dead bushes and the odd cactus dot the surface.
$(bold)Buried treasure$()$(br)Dig the core for $(item)clay$(), the occasional $(item)gold$(), and rare buried $(item)bone$() — a fossil to find.
$(bold)Red dunes$()$(br)Throw a Desert Skyseed over a badlands and it grows from $(item)red sand$() and $(item)red sandstone$() instead — and carries badlands' richer gold.
